frontend.notes: No frontend layer. Users interact via LiveKit WebRTC playground or REST API. Voice-first design.

backend_services.name: REST API Server
backend_services.auth: Bearer token (debug endpoints only, via DEBUG_AUTH_TOKEN env var)

backend_services.name: LiveKit WebRTC Agent
backend_services.description: Real-time voice/vision agent. Receives audio/video via LiveKit, processes frames, returns speech.

workers.name: Frame Orchestrator
workers.description: Per-frame fusion engine: collects parallel worker results, validates timestamps, builds SceneGraph

workers.name: Perception Worker Pool
workers.description: Submits detection/depth/embedding/OCR to thread pool for CPU-bound inference

workers.name: Worker Pool
workers.description: Generic async worker pool for parallel task execution

workers.name: Watchdog
workers.description: Monitors pipeline health, detects stalls, triggers restarts

databases.name: FAISS Vector Index
databases.description: Similarity search for memory embeddings. Persisted to disk.

databases.name: QR Cache
databases.description: Offline-first cache for previously scanned QR code results

databases.name: Face Consent Store
databases.description: Persistent consent state for face detection features

databases.name: Session Logs
databases.description: Circular buffer of session events for debug/replay

external_integrations.name: Ollama / qwen3-vl (Vision LLM)
external_integrations.description: Primary vision model for image analysis and people detection

external_integrations.name: Ollama Embeddings (qwen3-embedding:4b)
external_integrations.description: Text embedding generation for RAG memory indexing

external_integrations.name: qwen3.5:cloud (LLM via Ollama cloud runtime)
external_integrations.description: Single LLM provider for RAG reasoning, VQA, and general chat. Accessed via Ollama cloud runtime with async HTTP calls.

external_integrations.name: ElevenLabs (TTS)
external_integrations.description: Natural voice synthesis for text-to-speech output

external_integrations.name: Tavus (Virtual Avatar)
external_integrations.description: Optional virtual avatar for video calls. Disabled by default.

external_integrations.name: LiveKit (WebRTC)
external_integrations.description: Real-time audio/video transport and room management

external_integrations.name: DuckDuckGo Search
external_integrations.description: Web search for answering general knowledge questions

external_integrations.name: YOLO Object Detection (ONNX)
external_integrations.description: Real-time object detection for spatial perception

external_integrations.name: MiDaS Depth Estimation (ONNX)
external_integrations.description: Per-pixel depth estimation for distance calculation

external_integrations.name: EasyOCR
external_integrations.description: Primary OCR backend — GPU-accelerated text recognition

external_integrations.name: Tesseract OCR
external_integrations.description: Secondary OCR backend — requires tesseract binary

external_integrations.name: pyzbar (QR)
external_integrations.description: QR code / barcode detection and decoding

auth_mechanism: Bearer token for debug endpoints only (DEBUG_AUTH_TOKEN). No user auth — system is single-user assistive device.

caching_layers.name: Debouncer
caching_layers.description: Prevents redundant processing of similar consecutive frames
